title: Marie Hejka
compiled_truth: Marie Hejka is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-01-06 to 2001-10-24), Marie Hejka sent 27 and received 71 emails, totalling 98 interactions. Top correspondents: [Steven Kean](people/steven-kean) (24), [Andrea Yowman](people/andrea-yowman) (10), [George Wasaff](people/george-wasaff) (10), [Anthony Mends](people/anthony-mends) (10), [Cindy Olson](people/cindy-olson) (8).
